problem_statement: The read-only worker rehearsal receipt is contract-bound, but the operator-facing receipt panel did not yet expose the rehearsal evidence. Without a governed read-only projection, future worker runtime work could skip operator-visible evidence review or confuse local dry-run evidence with dispatch success.
success_criteria: personal-assistant console read model carries a schema-backed receipt viewer binding
the Foundation Mode console example projects the read-only worker rehearsal receipt by id, schema ref, source ref, worker path, dry-run mode, digest ref, and denial flags
runtime console construction emits an empty governed viewer binding by default
receipt viewer projection does not grant runtime dispatch, filesystem write, external effect, connector call, terminal closure, or success-claim authority
focused tests reject viewer count drift, source-ref drift, terminal-closure drift, and dispatch-authority drift
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: the viewer binding is a read-only projection and not a runtime receipt emitter
ReadOnlyWorkerRehearsalReceipt remains the canonical local dry-run evidence source
future runtime admission must still require temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, recovery evidence, and verification
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: focused pytest receipt for viewer binding behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
